name: bookworm
description: Bookworm digests books, safely refines research, and enriches notes with verified sources.

interface.shortDescription: Digest books and improve research for Obsidian.
interface.longDescription: Bookworm helps Codex turn practical books and existing Markdown research into clean, reader-facing Obsidian notes. Digest reads long EPUB/PDF books; Refine preserves sources while cleaning exports; Enrich adds a fresh verified source layer.
interface.defaultPrompt: Use Bookworm to digest a book, safely refine a research note, or enrich it with verified sources.
